summary: PR-08 follow-up: the character-create screen was unusable because the PR-05 live preview plus the many creation selectors made the form taller than the viewport, clipping the bottom and pushing the Create/Back buttons off-screen. shell_ui.gd _show_char_create now wraps the long form in a ScrollContainer (mirroring the world-create screen) and keeps the Create/Back action row added to _content AFTER the scroll, so it stays pinned and reachable at any viewport size; the PR-05 live preview and selector refresh are unchanged (the preview scrolls with the form). The shots tour also captures the screen at a 640x360 window. Fix commit ccd3f2a. Re-verified: waited-GUI smoke 346/346 (adds pr08_char_create_form_scrolls_actions_pinned) from a clean shell profile; validator + capsule_doctor public_repo + wiki links green; shots 07_character_create (1280x720) + 07b_character_create_small (640x360) reviewed. This docs-only run records the 346/346 count and the new check across the docs.
scope: PR-08 follow-up: shell_ui.gd character-create form scroll + pinned Create/Back actions; pr08_char_create_form_scrolls_actions_pinned smoke; shot-tour 640x360 capture. Docs-only sync of the 346/346 verification count and the new check (HANDOFF/matrix/queue/VARIABLE_MATRIX .md+.html + PR-08 ledger follow-up). No gameplay/save change, no image production, no broad wiki regen.
next_action: Operator review of the held PR-08 stack (195fffd, c33ae00, ccd3f2a) plus this docs sync; no push until reviewed.
